message:
bd-kb0u: Add comprehensive CM error handling tests

Add 25+ error handling tests for CM integration covering:
- PID file errors (missing, invalid JSON, empty)
- HTTP server errors (500, 503, connection refused)
- Malformed JSON responses and empty bodies
- Context cancellation and timeout handling
- Graceful degradation when CM unavailable
- CLIClient options validation and defaults
- Fallback behavior verification

All 33 tests pass with structured logging pattern:
[CM-ERROR], [CM-DEGRADE], [CM-FALLBACK]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
